title: Feature - Campaign List Dashboard
description: Implement a dashboard view listing all campaigns owned by the GM with an option to create a new campaign.
execution_steps: Implement GET /campaigns endpoint in backend to return campaigns for the logged-in GM.
Create CampaignList.tsx React component matching UIC-006.
Update App.tsx to display CampaignList by default for GMs.
definition_of_done: GM dashboard displays a list of campaigns owned by the GM.
GM can click a button to reveal the CampaignForm to create a new campaign.
Backend endpoint correctly filters campaigns by gm_user_id.
Code contains @trace annotations for the task.
